# Define normalization helpers
import re, unicodedata

AR_DIAC = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = "\u0640"
def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    text = text.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    text = AR_DIAC.sub("", text)
    # unify hamza forms
    text = re.sub("[إأآا]", "ا", text)
    text = re.sub("ى", "ي", text)
    text = re.sub("ؤ", "و", text)
    text = re.sub("ئ", "ي", text)
    text = re.sub("[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]", " ", text)
    text = re.sub("\s+", " ", text).strip()
    return text

target_full = "إِنَّ الصَّوْتَ يُقَوِّمُ بِالصَّوْتِ"
target_snip = "إِنَّ الصّ...ِالصَّوْتِ"
norm_target = normalize_ar(target_full)
norm_target

# Broaden search: look for occurrences of key words "الصوت يقوم" etc.
keywords = ["الصوت يقوم بالصوت", "يقوم بالصوت", "الصوت يقوم", "يقوم الصوت", "ان الصوت يقوم"]

        if any(k in n for k in keywords):
            hits.append((i, field, txt))
            break
len(hits)
